subject: english
title: Unit 8 Grammar 1 — Describing people with who
subtitle: Soccer + movies + family — 51 slides, ~45 min. Pattern: person + who + verb phrase.

content: Describe people using who + verb phrase.
Join two short sentences about a person into one using who.
Distinguish who (for people) from that/which (for things).
language: Use related vocabulary: clause, person, photographer, relative.
Use grammar pattern: person + who + verb phrase.
Use who to ask and answer questions about people.
